channel.description: This process worked at creating an image for me, but resulted in a highly unstable system that crashes. Will revisit this at another time. You will need to download a Fedora Live iso here: https://fedoraproject.org/en/workstation/download Then install livecd-iso-to-mediums to provide livecd-iso-to-disk dnf -y install livecd-iso-to-mediums Create a file called livecd-iso-to-disk.f38.patch.txt and add the following text to it: --- /usr/bin/livecd-iso-to-disk 2022-06-15 04:49:24.000000000 -0700 +++ livecd-iso-to-disk.patched 2023-04-27 09:11:13.665060837 -0700 @@ -1058,7 +1058,7 @@ createFSLayout() { udevadm settle -E $p2 mkfs.
